observations.cause: Work packets name files, validators, non-scope, and claim boundaries.
observations.release_consequence: Keep handoff-first packets as release workflow evidence.
observations.thor_odin_finding: Thor-style handoff is effective as a local worker/reviewer pattern.

observations.cause: validate-all and spine-specific validators check reports, manifests, and boundaries.
observations.release_consequence: Use validators as remediation acceptance gates.
observations.thor_odin_finding: Odin validators are stronger than prose-only handoffs.

observations.observation: Proof packets improved reviewability but are distributed.
observations.release_consequence: Remediation should add proof-chain/receipt closure index.
observations.thor_odin_finding: Proof continuity works but needs release index consolidation.

observations.cause: B-series and Road-to-100 docs coexist with newer FINAL-PR spines.
observations.observation: Older handoff artifacts can become stale.
observations.release_consequence: Old artifact deprecation cleanup is recommended.

observations.cause: This audit intentionally runs deterministic local checks only.
observations.observation: No live Thor or Odin model execution is evidenced.
observations.release_consequence: Do not claim model execution or runtime agent success.
observations.thor_odin_finding: Effectiveness finding is process/system-level, not runtime-level.
